name: get_balance
description: Get the current wallet balance for an agent in a specific currency.

agent_id.description: The agent identifier

currency.description: Currency code (default: CREDITS). One of: CREDITS, USD, EUR, GBP, BTC, ETH

name: get_usage_summary
description: Get usage summary (total cost, calls, tokens) for an agent.

agent_id.description: The agent identifier

name: deposit
description: Deposit funds into an agent's wallet in a specific currency.

currency.description: Currency code (default: CREDITS). One of: CREDITS, USD, EUR, GBP, BTC, ETH

idempotency_key.description: Optional unique key to prevent duplicate deposits. If a deposit with this key already exists, the cached result is returned.

name: get_transactions
description: Get the transaction ledger for an agent (deposits, withdrawals, charges).

agent_id.description: The agent identifier

limit.description: Maximum number of transactions to return

name: create_intent
description: Create a payment intent between two agents.

currency.description: Currency code (default: CREDITS). One of: CREDITS, USD, EUR, GBP, BTC, ETH

name: get_intent
description: Get details of a payment intent by its ID.

name: get_escrow
description: Get details of an escrow by its ID.

name: capture_intent
description: Capture (settle) a pending payment intent.

name: partial_capture
description: Partially capture a pending payment intent for a specified amount.

intent_id.description: The payment intent ID to partially capture

amount.description: Amount to capture (must be <= intent amount)

idempotency_key.description: Optional idempotency key to prevent duplicate captures

name: create_escrow
description: Create an escrow between two agents. Funds are held from payer immediately.

currency.description: Currency code (default: CREDITS). One of: CREDITS, USD, EUR, GBP, BTC, ETH

idempotency_key.description: Unique key for idempotent creation. Same key returns same escrow.

name: release_escrow
description: Release escrowed funds to the payee.

name: cancel_escrow
description: Cancel a held escrow and refund the payer.

name: list_intents
description: List payment intents for an agent, optionally filtered by status.

agent_id.description: The agent to list intents for (as payer or payee)

status.description: Filter by status (pending, captured, voided, refunded)

name: list_escrows
description: List escrows for an agent, optionally filtered by status.

agent_id.description: The agent to list escrows for (as payer or payee)

status.description: Filter by status (held, released, refunded, expired)

name: refund_intent
description: Refund a payment intent: voids if pending, reverse-transfers if settled.

name: refund_settlement
description: Refund a settled payment (full or partial). If amount is omitted, refunds the full remaining balance.

amount.description: Amount to refund. If omitted, refunds the full remaining balance.

idempotency_key.description: Optional unique key to prevent duplicate refunds.

name: search_services
description: Search the marketplace for available services. Supports pagination via paginate=true.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

paginate.description: When true, returns paginated envelope {items, total, offset, limit, has_more}

name: search_agents
description: Search for agents by capability keywords. Searches service names, descriptions, tools, tags, and categories. Supports pagination via paginate=true.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

paginate.description: When true, returns paginated envelope {items, total, offset, limit, has_more}

name: best_match
description: Find the best matching services for a query with ranking.

name: register_service
description: Register a new service in the marketplace.

name: get_service
description: Get a marketplace service by its ID.

name: update_service
description: Update fields on an existing marketplace service.

name: deactivate_service
description: Deactivate a marketplace service listing.

name: get_trust_score
description: Get the trust score for a server.

agent_id.description: Alias for server_id (preferred). Supply either agent_id or server_id.

name: search_servers
description: Search for servers by name or minimum trust score.

name: get_payment_history
description: Get payment history for an agent.

name: register_server
description: Register a new server for trust tracking.

transport_type.description: Transport protocol (http or stdio). Default: http.

server_id.description: Optional custom server ID; auto-generated if not provided.

name: delete_server
description: Delete a server and all its associated trust data (probes, scans, scores).

server_id.description: The server identifier to delete. Alias: agent_id

agent_id.description: Alias for server_id (preferred). Supply either agent_id or server_id.

name: update_server
description: Update a server's name and/or URL.

server_id.description: The server identifier to update. Alias: agent_id

agent_id.description: Alias for server_id (preferred). Supply either agent_id or server_id.

name: get_global_audit_log
description: Get the global audit log across all agents (admin operation).

name: publish_event
description: Publish an event to the cross-product event bus.

name: get_events
description: Query events from the event bus with optional type filter and offset.

name: register_webhook
description: Register a webhook endpoint to receive event notifications.

agent_id.description: The agent registering the webhook

url.description: The URL to receive webhook POST requests

event_types.description: Event types to subscribe to (e.g. billing.deposit)

secret.description: Shared secret for HMAC-SHA3 signature verification

filter_agent_ids.description: Optional list of agent_ids to filter events. When set, only events whose agent_id/payer/payee/sender/recipient matches an entry in this list will be delivered. When null or empty, all matching events are delivered.
The configured agent_id filter, or null if not set

name: list_webhooks
description: List all registered webhooks for an agent. Supports pagination via paginate=true.

agent_id.description: The agent whose webhooks to list

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return (used with paginate=true)

paginate.description: When true, returns paginated envelope {items, total, offset, limit, has_more}

name: delete_webhook
description: Delete (deactivate) a webhook by its ID.

name: get_webhook_deliveries
description: Get delivery history for a webhook endpoint.

webhook_id.description: The webhook ID to query deliveries for

limit.description: Maximum number of deliveries to return

name: process_due_subscriptions
description: Trigger processing of all due subscriptions and expired escrows.

name: register_agent
description: Register a cryptographic identity for an agent. Generates Ed25519 keypair.

agent_id.description: Unique agent identifier

public_key.description: Optional Ed25519 public key hex. Auto-generated if omitted.

name: verify_agent
description: Verify that a message was signed by the claimed agent.

agent_id.description: The agent who claims to have signed

name: submit_metrics
description: Submit trading bot metrics (Sharpe, drawdown, latency, etc.) for platform attestation.

agent_id.description: The agent submitting metrics

name: get_agent_identity
description: Get the cryptographic identity and public key for an agent.

agent_id.description: The agent identifier

name: get_verified_claims
description: Get all verified metric claims for an agent (e.g., Sharpe >= 2.0).

agent_id.description: The agent identifier

name: get_agent_reputation
description: Get the consumer-side reputation score for an agent.

agent_id.description: The agent identifier

name: create_subscription
description: Create a recurring payment subscription between two agents.

idempotency_key.description: Unique key for idempotent creation. Same key returns same subscription.

currency.description: Currency code (default: CREDITS). One of: CREDITS, USD, EUR, GBP, BTC, ETH

name: cancel_subscription
description: Cancel an active or suspended subscription.

name: get_subscription
description: Get details of a subscription by ID.

name: list_subscriptions
description: List subscriptions for an agent (as payer or payee).

agent_id.description: Filter by agent (payer or payee)

name: reactivate_subscription
description: Reactivate a suspended subscription.

idempotency_key.description: Optional idempotency key to prevent duplicate reactivations

name: create_wallet
description: Create a new wallet for an agent (self-service onboarding).

agent_id.description: Agent identifier for the new wallet

name: withdraw
description: Withdraw funds from an agent's wallet in a specific currency.

currency.description: Currency code (default: CREDITS). One of: CREDITS, USD, EUR, GBP, BTC, ETH

idempotency_key.description: Optional unique key to prevent duplicate withdrawals. If a withdrawal with this key already exists, the cached result is returned.

name: search_agents_by_metrics
description: Search for agents with verified metric claims (e.g., find bots with Sharpe >= 2.0).

name: create_performance_escrow
description: Create an escrow that auto-releases when payee's verified metrics meet a threshold.

idempotency_key.description: Optional unique key to prevent duplicate escrow creation.

name: check_performance_escrow
description: Check if a performance-gated escrow's metric threshold is met and auto-release if so.

name: open_dispute
description: Open a dispute against an escrow.

name: respond_to_dispute
description: Respond to an open dispute.

name: resolve_dispute
description: Resolve a dispute by refunding payer or releasing funds to payee.

name: get_dispute
description: Get details of a dispute by its ID.

dispute_id.description: The dispute ID to look up

name: list_disputes
description: List disputes where the agent is opener or respondent.

agent_id.description: The agent to list disputes for

limit.description: Maximum number of disputes to return

name: rotate_key
description: Rotate an API key: revoke the current key and create a new one with the same tier.

name: build_claim_chain
description: Build a Merkle tree from an agent's attestation history for verifiable claim chains.

name: get_claim_chains
description: Get stored Merkle claim chains for an agent.

name: send_message
description: Send a typed message to another agent.

name: get_messages
description: Get messages for an agent (sent and received).

name: negotiate_price
description: Start a price negotiation with another agent.

name: check_sla_compliance
description: Check if a server meets its claimed SLA using trust probe data.

agent_id.description: Alias for server_id (preferred). Supply either agent_id or server_id.

name: list_strategies
description: List signal provider strategies in the marketplace.

name: get_service_analytics
description: Get usage analytics for an agent (total calls, cost, tokens).

name: get_revenue_report
description: Get revenue report for a provider agent (incoming payments).

name: create_split_intent
description: Create a split payment across multiple payees with percentage-based distribution.

currency.description: Currency code (default: CREDITS). One of: CREDITS, USD, EUR, GBP, BTC, ETH

name: backup_database
description: Create a hot backup of a SQLite database, optionally encrypted with Fernet.

key_id.description: Identifier for the server-stored encryption key (use with restore_database)

name: restore_database
description: Restore a SQLite database from a backup file, with optional decryption.

database.description: Logical database name to restore into

key.description: Decryption key if backup is encrypted

key_id.description: Key ID from backup_database (retrieves server-stored key)

name: check_db_integrity
description: Run SQLite integrity check and return page diagnostics for a database.

name: list_backups
description: List all available database backup files.

name: stripe_list_customers
description: List Stripe customers.

name: stripe_create_customer
description: Create a Stripe customer.

name: stripe_list_products
description: List Stripe products.

name: stripe_create_product
description: Create a Stripe product.

name: stripe_list_prices
description: List Stripe prices.

name: stripe_create_price
description: Create a Stripe price.

name: stripe_create_payment_link
description: Create a Stripe payment link.

name: stripe_list_invoices
description: List Stripe invoices.

name: stripe_create_invoice
description: Create a Stripe invoice.

name: stripe_list_subscriptions
description: List Stripe subscriptions.

name: stripe_cancel_subscription
description: Cancel a Stripe subscription.

name: stripe_create_refund
description: Create a Stripe refund.

name: stripe_retrieve_balance
description: Retrieve Stripe account balance.

name: github_list_repos
description: List GitHub repositories.

name: github_get_repo
description: Get GitHub repository metadata.

name: github_list_issues
description: List issues in a repository.

name: github_create_issue
description: Create an issue in a repository.

name: github_list_pull_requests
description: List pull requests.

name: github_get_pull_request
description: Get pull request details.

name: github_create_pull_request
description: Create a pull request.

name: github_list_commits
description: List commits in a repository.

name: github_get_file_contents
description: Get file contents from a repository.

name: github_search_code
description: Search code across repositories.

name: pg_query
description: Execute a read-only SQL query.

name: pg_execute
description: Execute a SQL statement (if write-enabled).

name: pg_list_tables
description: List tables in the database.

name: pg_describe_table
description: Describe a table's columns and types.

name: pg_explain_query
description: EXPLAIN a SQL query plan.

name: pg_list_schemas
description: List schemas in the database.

name: get_metrics_timeseries
description: Get per-agent usage metrics bucketed by hour or day.

agent_id.description: The agent identifier

limit.description: Max number of buckets to return

name: get_agent_leaderboard
description: Rank agents by total spend, calls, trust score, revenue, or rating.

name: register_event_schema
description: Register a JSON schema for an event type in the event bus.

schema.description: JSON schema object for the event payload

name: get_event_schema
description: Retrieve the registered JSON schema for an event type.

name: test_webhook
description: Send a test ping event to a registered webhook and return the delivery result.

webhook_id.description: The webhook ID to send a test ping to

name: create_api_key
description: Create a new API key for yourself (self-service). Only same-agent or admin can create.

agent_id.description: Agent to create the key for

tier.description: Tier for the new key (defaults to current tier)

name: get_volume_discount
description: Calculate discounted price based on historical usage volume.

agent_id.description: The agent identifier

tool_name.description: The tool to check volume discount for

name: estimate_cost
description: Calculate projected cost of N calls to a specific tool without executing them.

tool_name.description: The tool to estimate cost for

agent_id.description: Optional agent ID for volume discount

name: rate_service
description: Rate a marketplace service (1-5). One rating per agent per service (upsert).

agent_id.description: The agent providing the rating

name: get_service_ratings
description: Get ratings and reviews for a marketplace service.

service_id.description: The service to get ratings for

limit.description: Maximum number of ratings to return (default 20)

name: set_budget_cap
description: Set daily/monthly spending caps and alert thresholds for an agent.

agent_id.description: The agent to set caps for

alert_threshold.description: Fraction (0-1) at which to trigger alert (default 0.8)

name: get_budget_status
description: Get current spending vs budget caps and alert status for an agent.

agent_id.description: The agent to check budget status for

name: freeze_wallet
description: Freeze a wallet, blocking all deposits and withdrawals. Admin only.

agent_id.description: The agent whose wallet to freeze

name: unfreeze_wallet
description: Unfreeze a wallet, allowing deposits and withdrawals again. Admin only.

agent_id.description: The agent whose wallet to unfreeze

name: create_org
description: Create a new organization.

name: get_org
description: Get organization details and members.

name: add_agent_to_org
description: Add an agent to an organization.

agent_id.description: The agent to add

name: remove_agent_from_org
description: Remove an agent from an organization. Cannot remove the last owner.

agent_id.description: The agent to remove

name: list_api_keys
description: List all API keys for an agent. Returns truncated key hash prefix, tier, scopes, and created_at (never the full key or hash). Supports pagination via paginate=true.

agent_id.description: The agent whose keys to list

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return (used with paginate=true)

paginate.description: When true, returns paginated envelope {items, total, offset, limit, has_more}

name: revoke_api_key
description: Soft-delete (revoke) an API key by its hash prefix. The key will no longer be usable for authentication.

agent_id.description: The agent who owns the key

key_hash_prefix.description: First 8 characters of the key hash (from list_api_keys)

name: get_exchange_rate
description: Query the exchange rate between two supported currencies.

from_currency.description: Source currency code. One of: CREDITS, USD, EUR, GBP, BTC, ETH

to_currency.description: Target currency code. One of: CREDITS, USD, EUR, GBP, BTC, ETH

name: convert_currency
description: Convert funds between currency balances for an agent. Withdraws from source currency and deposits converted amount to target currency.

agent_id.description: The agent whose balances to convert

amount.description: Amount to convert in the source currency

from_currency.description: Source currency code. One of: CREDITS, USD, EUR, GBP, BTC, ETH

to_currency.description: Target currency code. One of: CREDITS, USD, EUR, GBP, BTC, ETH

name: ingest_metrics
description: Ingest time-series metric data points for an agent. Supports optional Ed25519 signature verification for authenticated submissions.

agent_id.description: The agent identifier

signature.description: Optional Ed25519 signature hex over canonical JSON of metrics+nonce

nonce.description: Optional unique nonce for replay protection (required if signature is provided)

data_source.description: Data source tier: self_reported, exchange_api, platform_verified

name: query_metrics
description: Query time-series metric data for a specific agent and metric name, with optional time range filtering.

agent_id.description: The agent identifier

limit.description: Maximum number of data points to return (default: 100)

name: get_metric_deltas
description: Get performance deltas (current vs previous value) for an agent across all metrics or a specific metric.

agent_id.description: The agent identifier

metric_name.description: Optional: specific metric to compute delta for

name: get_metric_averages
description: Get pre-computed rolling averages for an agent over a specified period (7d, 30d, or 90d).

agent_id.description: The agent identifier

name: submit_verification
description: Submit a formal verification job with Z3 SMT properties. Returns a job ID for tracking.

agent_id.description: The agent submitting the verification

properties.description: List of Z3 SMT-LIB2 property specifications to verify

webhook_url.description: Optional webhook URL for completion notification

idempotency_key.description: Optional idempotency key to prevent duplicate submissions

metadata.description: Optional metadata to attach to the job

name: get_verification_status
description: Get the current status and result of a verification job.

name: list_verification_jobs
description: List verification jobs for an agent with optional status filter.

agent_id.description: The agent whose jobs to list

name: cancel_verification
description: Cancel a pending or running verification job.

job_id.description: The verification job ID to cancel

name: get_proof
description: Retrieve a formal verification proof artifact by ID.

name: verify_proof
description: Verify a formal verification proof by its SHA3-256 hash. Returns validity status.

proof_hash.description: The SHA3-256 hash of the proof to verify
